videos.title: The Abel (not Nobel) Prize - Numberphile
videos.author: Numberphile
videos.description:
Numberphile creator Brady Haran sees Gerd Faltings receive the Abel Prize - and goes behind the scenes at this prestigious event in Norway. Playlist from the event (with the longer interviews) at https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLt5AfwLFPxWL4w1j3Xc3hZekFUNHGHCfq

Abel Prize website: https://ab

videos.description:

videos.title: Red & Black Knights (extraordinary result) - Numberphile

videos.description:

videos.title: Entirely Ridiculously Big Numbers - Numberphile
videos.author: Numberphile
videos.description:
Rubik's Cube combinations quickly lead to some unimaginably large numbers. More links & stuff in full description below ↓↓↓

Extra footage on odd-numbered cubes: https://youtu.be/CTb7RyTwoQ0

Featuring Richard Elwes. More Richard on Numberphile: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLt5AfwLFPxWI42W

videos.title: Mathematician Attempts Art - Numberphile
videos.author: Numberphile
videos.description:
Hannah Fry returns to Numberphile to showcase her art skills (and show us her new portrait at The Royal Society). See the Objectivity video (for more about the REAL artwork) at https://youtu.be/3HLxB5LbrDU
